title: SACRAMENTO, CA—

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Legislature passed two bonds for voters’ consideration this November.",
    "The Kindergarten Through Grade 12 Schools and Local Community College Public Education Facilities Modernization, Repair, and Safety Bond Act of 2024 aims to modernize and repair education facilities.",
    "The Safe Drinking Water, Wildfire Prevention, Drought Preparedness, and Clean Air Bond Act of 2024 addresses critical needs related to climate action.",
    "The California climate bond aims to make historic and transformational investments for wildfire prevention and access to clean water.",
    "The climate bond is designed to bolster resiliency and create economic opportunities while addressing equity for vulnerable communities.",
    "The climate bond investment targets unique issues faced by historically marginalized communities to ensure geographical equity.",
    "The statewide school bond aims to repair dilapidated and unsafe school facilities.",
    "The bond is designed to meet 21st century educational and workforce needs.",
    "If approved, the school bond will provide state matching dollars to every school district in California.",
    "The bond allocates 10% of the funding for small districts to ensure fairness in financial assistance.",
    "Research indicates that students thrive in modernized school buildings.",
    "The Safe Drinking Water, Wildfire Prevention, Drought Preparedness, and Clean Air Bond Act of 2024 would finance climate-smart projects to enhance community resilience against natural disasters.",
    "Climate change has amplified the frequency and impact of wildfires, droughts, storms, and other natural disasters in California."
  ]
}
```
